page.title: Administrative intake
page.lede: Share care and support preferences so a coordinator can suggest professionals. This is an administrative process—MindMesh does not diagnose and matching results are not clinical recommendations.
page.demoNote: Demo only — use fictional information. Nothing is sent to a real backend or AI provider.

fields.preferredPeriodsHint: Select all that work for you.
fields.maximumPriceHint: An estimate is fine. This helps with administrative matching only.
fields.descriptionHint: Optional free text for administrative matching. Avoid sharing information you would not want stored in a demo.

preferences.lede: Tell us how and when you prefer to meet. These are administrative preferences for matching, not clinical recommendations.

supportNeeds.lede: Share a general support topic and any optional details. MindMesh does not diagnose and does not replace professional care.

review.title: Review your intake
review.lede: Confirm your information before submitting. You can return to either previous step to make changes.
review.privacyBody: This is a fictional MindMesh demo. Information you enter stays in this browser session for demonstration only and is not sent to a real backend, clinic, or AI provider. Do not enter real patient-identifying or clinical data.
review.consentLabel: I have read the privacy notice. I understand this is a fictional demo for administrative intake and matching. Matching results are suggestions, not clinical recommendations. I consent to submit this information for the demo.

validation.preferredPeriodsMin: Select at least one preferred period.
validation.invalidPrice: Enter a valid maximum price greater than zero.
validation.priceTooHigh: Enter a maximum of 2000 for this demo.
validation.descriptionMax: Please keep the description under 2000 characters.

success.title: Intake submitted
success.body: Your administrative intake was received for this demo (reference {{id}}). A coordinator would review matching suggestions next. Matching results are suggestions, not clinical recommendations.

error.submission: Unable to submit intake. Please try again.
